fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code that identifies the data exchange setup.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the data exchange definition.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what type of exchange the data exchange definition is used for.

fields.name: Reading/Writing XMLport
fields.tooltip: Specifies the XMLport through which an imported data file or service enters prior to mapping and through which exported data exits when it is written to a data file or service after mapping.

fields.name: Header Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many header lines exist in the file. This ensures that the header data is not imported. This field is only relevant for import.

fields.name: Header Tag
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text of the first column on the header line.

fields.name: Footer Tag
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text of the first column on the footer line. If a footer line exists in several places in the file, enter the text of the first column on the footer line to ensure that the footer data is not imported. This field is only relevant for import.

fields.name: Column Separator
fields.tooltip: Specifies how columns in the file are separated if the file is of type Variable Text.

fields.name: File Encoding
fields.tooltip: Specifies the encoding of the file to be imported. This field is only relevant for import.

fields.name: File Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what type of file the data exchange definition is used for. You can select between three file types.

fields.name: Ext. Data Handling Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that transfers external data in and out of the Data Exchange Framework.

fields.name: Reading/Writing Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that processes imported data prior to mapping and exported data after mapping.

fields.name: Validation Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that is used to validate data against pre-defined business rules.

fields.name: Data Handling Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that transfers data in and out of tables in Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: User Feedback Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that does various clean-up after mapping, such as marks the lines as exported and deletes temporary records.

fields.name: Custom Column Separator
fields.tooltip: Specifies how columns in the file are separated if the file is of a custom type.

fields.name: Line Separator
fields.tooltip: Specifies how lines in the file are separated if the file is of type Variable Text.
